title: Ellipse2D Object
description: Transient 2D ellipse. A transient ellipse is not displayed or saved in a document. Transient 2D ellipses are used as a wrapper to work with raw 2D ellipse information. They are created statically using the create method of the Ellipse2D class.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates and returns a copy of this Ellipse2D object.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a transient 2D ellipse by specifying a center position, major and minor axes, and major and minor radii.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Gets all of the data defining the ellipse.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets all of the data defining the ellipse.

properties.name: asNurbsCurve
properties.description: Returns a NURBS curve that is geometrically identical to the ellipse.

properties.name: center
properties.description: Gets and sets the center position of the ellipse.

properties.name: curveType
properties.description: Returns the type of geometry this curve represents.

properties.name: evaluator
properties.description: Returns an evaluator object that lets you perform additional evaluations on the curve.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: majorAxis
properties.description: Gets and sets the major axis of the ellipse.

properties.name: majorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the major radius of the ellipse.

properties.name: minorRadius
properties.description: Gets and sets the minor radius of the ellipse.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

asNurbsCurve.title: Ellipse2D.asNurbsCurve Property
asNurbsCurve.description: Returns a NURBS curve that is geometrically identical to the ellipse.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = ellipse2D_var.asNurbsCurve

objectType.title: Ellipse2D.objectType Property
objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = ellipse2D_var.objectType

classType.title: Ellipse2D.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

copy.title: Ellipse2D.copy Method
copy.description: Creates and returns a copy of this Ellipse2D object.
copy.return_description: Returns a new Ellipse2D object that is a copy of this Ellipse2D object.

create.title: Ellipse2D.create Method
create.description: Creates a transient 2D ellipse by specifying a center position, major and minor axes, and major and minor radii.
create.return_description: Returns the new Ellipse 2D object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: A Point2D object that defines the center of the ellipse.

parameters.name: majorAxis
parameters.description: The major axis of the ellipse

parameters.name: majorRadius
parameters.description: The major radius of the of the ellipse.

parameters.name: minorRadius
parameters.description: The minor radius of the of the ellipse.

getData.title: Ellipse2D.getData Method
getData.description: Gets all of the data defining the ellipse.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: The output center point of the ellipse.

parameters.name: majorAxis
parameters.description: The output major axis of the ellipse.

parameters.name: majorRadius
parameters.description: The output major radius of the of the ellipse.

parameters.name: minorRadius
parameters.description: The output minor radius of the of the ellipse.

set.title: Ellipse2D.set Method
set.description: Sets all of the data defining the ellipse.
set.return_description: Returns true if redefining the ellipse is successful.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: A Point2D object that defines the center of the ellipse.

parameters.name: majorAxis
parameters.description: The major axis of the ellipse.

parameters.name: majorRadius
parameters.description: The major radius of the of the ellipse.

parameters.name: minorRadius
parameters.description: The minor radius of the of the ellipse.

transformBy.title: Ellipse2D.transformBy Method
transformBy.return_description: Return true if the transform was successful.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.description: A 2D matrix that defines the transform to apply to the curve.
